operation: getRequest — full detail for one request, including its files

body.requestId: the canonical 8-digit request id (NOT the 2-char response field)

success.data.files: {firm:[...], firmSize:n, client:[...], clientSize:n} — firm = files the audit firm posted, client = files the client uploaded
success.file_object: {id, fmsId, createdTime, requestType, userType, userId, fileSize, deltaValue, origFileName, fileType, stateChange, ts, providedByName, providedDate, downloads[], user{}}

gotchas: Run calls sequentially (Suralink session serializes gateway calls); read window.csrf live per call as a safety net, but on this endpoint the token does NOT observably rotate — a whole-engagement sweep uses one snapshot
the response field data.requestId is a 2-char display index, NOT the real id; data.id is the real id
